rationale: Substantial Phase 10 DDD/TDD PR. Domain: internal/domain/ai/ adds entity_phase10.go (AnnotationTask with lifecycle states pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled, LLMModelConfig with tongyi/openai/bailian/self_hosted provider enum), service_phase10.go implementing CreateTask/StartTask/CompleteTask/CancelTask/SubmitAnnotation with the documented duplicate-submit guard and auto-complete when `labeled_items >= total_items`, errors_phase10.go enumerating ErrInvalidAnnotationType/ErrInvalidLLMProvider/ErrLLMConfigNotFound/etc. Tests in service_phase10_test.go are the 13 claimed (CreateTask, InvalidType, TaskLifecycle, CancelTask, SubmitAndAutoComplete with explicit 'second item should auto-complete' comment, DuplicateSubmit, ListResults, plus 4 LLMGateway tests including NoDefault error path, plus 2 WebRTCQuality tests). Call BC: entity_phase10.go adds WebRTCQualityLog with QualityLevel mapping (excellent/good/poor based on packet loss + MOS thresholds). Infrastructure: 4 MySQL repos with the standard `var _ Interface = (*Type)(nil)` compile-time check. Three HTTP handlers (annotation.go, llm_gateway.go, webrtc_quality.go) registered on router.go with the 17 documented routes; main.go wires the new repos and services. snowflake.NextID() called at all 4 entity creation points as the body's 'Devin Review fixes' line claims. Real implementation with substantive TDD coverage.
